_说明: 文章类型策略包。每种类型定义字数范围、Schema 类型、开头模板、大纲要求、内链期望、QA 侧重点和推荐样式块。程序 prompt-builder.js 读取此文件注入 Prompt。
_使用方式: keywords.csv 的 articletype 字段值须与此文件的顶层 key 完全匹配。

buying-guide._说明: 购买指南。目标读者正在做购买决策，需要对比选项、了解选购标准、最终指向具体产品页。
openingTemplates: After testing [N] kits across [skill range / theme / price point], one pattern becomes clear: [core buying insight].
Most buyers approach [topic] with the wrong question. The right one is: [reframe the decision].
The difference between a kit you finish and one you abandon comes down to [key variable] — and it's visible before you buy.
buying-guide.titleFormat: Best [Product Category] [Year] — [Key Differentiator or Buyer Need]

mustInclude: H2: Who this guide is for (skill level, time, occasion)
H2: What to look for (difficulty rating, piece count, LED inclusion, instruction language)
H2: Top picks by [category or use case] with product cards
H2: FAQ — at least 3 questions from buyerFAQ[]
H2: Final recommendation
mustAvoid: Using 'best' without a stated selection criterion
Listing products without difficulty or time disclosure

price-guide._说明: 价格指南。帮助买家理解价格区间、判断性价比。聚焦「这个价格能买到什么」，避免纯粹堆砌价格数字。
openingTemplates: Miniature house kits range from [low] to [high] — but the price difference isn't always about complexity. Here's what actually changes at each tier.
After reviewing [N] kits across [price range], the pattern is clear: [key insight about what price buys].
Most buyers overspend on their first kit. The right entry point is [price range], and here's why.
price-guide.titleFormat: [Product Category] Price Guide — What You Get at Every Budget

mustInclude: H2: Price tiers with what each tier includes (difficulty, piece count, LED, instructions)
H2: What drives the price difference (materials, complexity, included accessories)
H2: Best value picks at each tier with product cards
H2: FAQ on pricing — e.g. 'Is a $30 kit worth it?'
mustAvoid: Claiming a specific kit is 'cheap' or 'expensive' without context
Omitting difficulty disclosure next to price

comparison._說明: 对比评测。A vs B 结构，帮助买家在两个或多个具体选项之间做最终决策。结尾必须给出明确建议，不允许「两者都好」结尾。
openingTemplates: The difference between [Kit A] and [Kit B] comes down to [key variable] — and it's visible if you know what to look at.
Both kits are good. But they're not good for the same builder. Here's which one fits your situation.
After building both, the decision is simpler than it looks: [core differentiator in one sentence].
comparison.titleFormat: [Kit A] vs [Kit B]: Which Miniature Kit Is Right for You?

mustInclude: H2: Quick comparison table (difficulty, piece count, time, LED, price, instruction language)
H2: [Kit A] — who it's for, what to expect
H2: [Kit B] — who it's for, what to expect
H2: Head-to-head on [1-2 key dimensions]
H2: Final verdict — state explicitly who should pick each one
H2: FAQ
mustAvoid: Omitting difficulty or time disclosure for either kit

faq._说明: FAQ 问答文章。围绕一个具体高频问题直接回答，前两句必须直接回答，不允许迂回或延迟。配合 FAQPage Schema。
openingTemplates: [Direct answer to the question in 1-2 sentences]. Here's what that means in practice.
The short answer: [answer]. The longer answer depends on [key variable].
[Core answer]. Most guides overcomplicate this — here's what actually matters.
faq.titleFormat: [Question as title]: [Direct Answer or Key Context]

mustInclude: H1 must be phrased as or derived from the target question
First paragraph: direct answer in ≤2 sentences
H2: Why / What this means in practice
H2: Related questions from buyerFAQ[]
CTA linking to relevant product or category page
mustAvoid: Delaying the answer past the first paragraph
Using 'it depends' as the opening sentence without immediately resolving the dependency

how-to._说明: 操作教程。聚焦完成一个具体任务的步骤。必须提前声明难度和预计时间，不允许声明「easy / simple」。每步骤必须可操作，不允许模糊指导。
openingTemplates: After evaluating [N] first-time builders working through this process, one step causes consistent trouble: [specific step]. Here's how to get through it.
This guide walks you through [task] step by step. Difficulty: Intermediate. Time: [X] hours, ideally split across two sessions.
Most instructions skip the step before step 1. This guide doesn't.
how-to.titleFormat: How to [Task]: Step-by-Step Guide for [Target Builder / Skill Level]

mustInclude: H2: What you need (tools, materials, kit contents)
H2: Before you start — difficulty, time estimate, session recommendation
H2 per major phase: Step-by-step with specific action verbs
H2: Common mistakes and how to fix them
H2: FAQ
mustAvoid: Giving a step without a concrete action ('Make sure the glue is set' → 'Wait 10 minutes with light pressure applied')

pillar._说明: 支柱文章 / Topic Hub 博客版。覆盖一个大话题的全貌，向下导流到子话题文章和产品页，横向连接其他支柱页。字数最长，内链最多。
openingTemplates: After evaluating [N] kits across [theme / price range / skill level], this guide covers everything you need to make a confident decision.
Miniature house kits span a wider range than most buyers expect — from [entry] to [advanced]. This guide maps the full landscape.
Most guides cover one type of kit. This one covers the decision behind choosing between them.
pillar.titleFormat: The Complete Guide to [Topic]: [Year] — Everything You Need to Know

mustInclude: H2: Overview — what this guide covers and who it's for
H2 per major subtopic: each links to dedicated article or category page
H2: How to choose — difficulty, skill level, occasion
H2: Product recommendations by category with product cards
H2: FAQ — at least 5 questions from buyerFAQ[]
H2: Author perspective — EEAT signal from storyBank
mustAvoid: Treating pillar as a collection of introductory paragraphs without depth
Omitting internal links to cluster articles
Not disclosing difficulty for any kit mentioned

listicle._说明: 图文清单型文章。用 numbered list 驱动全文，每个条目都有具体内容（不允许只写产品名）。适合「Best X for Y」「Top N kits for Z」类话题。
openingTemplates: After testing [N] kits, these [X] stand out — not because they're the most popular, but because they deliver on what they promise.
The miniature house kit market has more options than most buyers can evaluate. This list does the filtering.
These [N] kits represent different entry points — different difficulty levels, aesthetics, and time commitments. One of them is the right fit.
listicle.titleFormat: [N] Best [Product Type] for [Use Case / Occasion] — Tested and Reviewed

mustInclude: H2: How we selected these kits (criteria: difficulty, LED included, English instructions, assembly time)
H2 per kit: product name as heading, difficulty + time, who it's for, what makes it stand out, product link
H2: Quick comparison table
H2: FAQ
mustAvoid: Item entries that are only product names without context
More than 10 items without grouping by use case
